hero.subtitle: Safe, ad-free stories children love and parents trust. Watch characters come alive, hear professional narration, and discover the magic of reading together.
hero.noCreditCard: No credit card required • Cancel anytime

features.title: Stories That
features.subtitle: Every feature is designed with children's wellbeing in mind. Calm, educational, and utterly delightful.
features.listenToSample: Listen to a sample of our original soundtrack:
features.gentleAnimationDesc: Subtle movement brings stories to life without overstimulating. Perfect for bedtime or calm reading moments.
features.gentleAnimationBack: Our animations are designed by child development experts to engage without overwhelming. Studies show gentle visual movement aids comprehension while keeping children calm.
features.professionalNarrationDesc: Each story is beautifully read aloud with paced narration that encourages comprehension and literacy.
features.professionalNarrationBack: Voice artists trained in early childhood education narrate each story at the optimal pace for language acquisition and listening comprehension.
features.readAlongTextDesc: Highlighted words help children connect what they hear with what they see, building reading skills naturally.
features.readAlongTextBack: Word-by-word highlighting synchronised with narration strengthens phonemic awareness and helps children make the connection between spoken and written language.
features.screenTimeControlsDesc: Built-in monitoring and alerts help parents manage healthy screen time habits with customisable daily limits.
features.screenTimeControlsBack: Set daily limits, receive gentle alerts, and review weekly usage reports. Bedtime mode automatically winds down with calming stories.
features.researchBackedDesc: Every story and feature is grounded in child development research and early literacy best practices.
features.researchBackedBack: We partner with universities and child psychologists to ensure our content supports cognitive, emotional, and social development.
features.educatorInformedDesc: Developed with input from teachers and early years educators, shaped by real classroom insights.
features.educatorInformedBack: Used in over 500 schools. Includes curriculum-aligned lesson plans and discussion guides for classroom use.
features.socialEmotionalDesc: Stories carefully chosen to help children understand emotions, build empathy, and develop character.
features.socialEmotionalBack: Each story explores themes like kindness, resilience, and friendship, with discussion prompts to deepen understanding.
features.originalMusicDesc: Soothing soundtracks and playful sound effects enhance the storytelling experience.
features.originalMusicBack: Composed specifically for children, our music is designed to be engaging yet calming, supporting focus and emotional regulation.
features.offlineAccessDesc: Download your favorite stories to enjoy anywhere—even without an internet connection.
features.offlineAccessBack: Perfect for travel, waiting rooms, or areas with poor connectivity. Download unlimited stories with a subscription.

parentGuidance.storyIntro: The enduring delight of books reimagined for today's families. We take beloved children's stories and bring them to life with gentle animation, professional narration, and original music.
parentGuidance.step1Desc: We carefully select stories with stunning artwork that captivates young minds.
parentGuidance.step2Desc: Characters blink, leaves rustle, stars twinkle—just enough to engage, never overstimulate.
parentGuidance.step3Title: Professional narration brings it all together
parentGuidance.step3Desc: Warm voices, original music, and playful sound effects create magic.
parentGuidance.demoText: Once upon a time, in a forest far away, lived a curious little fox...
parentGuidance.guideSubtitle: Screen time doesn't have to be solo time. Freya scaffolds the experience for parents first—giving you the tools and confidence to make every story a shared adventure.
parentGuidance.activityGuidesDesc: Each story comes with parent tips—conversation starters, follow-up activities, and ways to extend the learning beyond the screen.
parentGuidance.coPlayDesc: Know exactly how to engage alongside your child. We show you when to pause, ask questions, and make story time interactive.
parentGuidance.ageAppropriateDesc: Get guidance tailored to your child's developmental stage—so you can support their learning at just the right level.
parentGuidance.discussionPromptsDesc: Turn passive watching into active learning with built-in prompts that spark meaningful conversations.
parentGuidance.ctaSubtitle: Join thousands of parents who've transformed their children's media time into moments of connection, learning, and joy.
parentGuidance.noCreditCard: No credit card required • Cancel anytime

research.title: Built on
research.subtitle: Every feature in Grow with Freya is grounded in academic research on screen time and child development, shaped by feedback from early years educators.
research.literacyResearchDesc: Our read-along technology and pacing is based on proven early literacy methodologies that support phonemic awareness and reading comprehension.
research.developingMindsDesc: Animation speed, colour palettes, and audio levels are calibrated to engage without overstimulating—informed by child development research.
research.healthyScreenTimeDesc: Our screen time monitoring and alerts are designed around AAP and WHO guidelines for healthy digital media use in early childhood.
research.researchFoundation: Built on postgraduate research and real-world feedback from teachers and nursery staff.
research.smartScreenTimeDesc: We believe parents should be in control. Our built-in parental controls help you set healthy boundaries while ensuring storytime remains a joy.
research.setDailyLimits: Set daily time limits per child
research.gentleAlerts: Receive gentle alerts when limits approach

pricing.title: Simple,
pricing.subtitle: Unlock full access to our complete digital library of animated storybooks. Start with a free 7-day trial.
pricing.guarantee: Free 7-day trial available • No credit card required to start • Cancel anytime

testimonials.title: Why Families
testimonials.subtitle: Join thousands of families who've made Grow with Freya part of their daily routine.
testimonials.quote1: The stories are beautifully chosen and have such lovely messages. The illustrations are stunning and so captivating. I don't mind letting my child have some screen time when it's a Freya story.
testimonials.quote2: My students love the animated stories! They are beginning readers and I love how the words are highlighted to help them read along. It's gotten them so interested in reading!
testimonials.quote3: Excellent content that is high quality, educational, and engaging! My child loves the variety and I'm impressed with the vocabulary growth she's gained from the stories.

faq.title: Frequently Asked
faq.q1: What age group is Grow with Freya designed for?
faq.a1: Our stories are perfect for children aged 2-8 years old. We have different content tiers appropriate for toddlers, preschoolers, and early readers.
faq.q2: How does the free trial work?
faq.a2: You get full access to our entire library for 7 days, completely free. No credit card required to start. Cancel anytime during the trial with no charges.
faq.a3: Yes! Download your favorite stories and enjoy them anywhere - perfect for car trips, flights, or places without internet.
faq.q4: Is the content safe for children?
faq.a4: Absolutely. Every story is reviewed by child development experts. There are no ads, no in-app purchases, and no external links. Your child's safety is our priority.
faq.a5: Our library includes over 100 animated storybooks, with new stories added regularly. One subscription gives you access to everything.
faq.q6: Can multiple children use one account?
faq.a6: Yes! You can create up to 4 child profiles on one account, each with their own reading progress and recommendations.
